MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
A. Kerry Stack, esq. (858-535-0700) of Thomas/Lucas for Cross Defendants/Opposing party Kenneth and Peter Paige VIA Court Call.
Thomas W. Chaffee, esq. (415-984-8534) of Clark Hill for Cross Complainants/Opposing party Kenneth and Peter Paige.
David M. Gonden, esq. (415-644-4828) of Trombadore Gonden for Cross Defendants/Moving Party 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION.

ARGUED. Attorney David Gonden reports the parties have reached an agreement and request 45 days with leave to amend in the event the agreement falls apart. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT 1042 MINNA HOMEOWNERS' ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The Motion is denied as to the HOA, the complaint sufficiently allege HOA's duty to maintain and repair the property. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend as to the individual members for cross-complaint to allege basis of liability. Cross-complaint may also add allegations regarding the incomplete construction so long as this is done in good faith and new allegations are not a sham. Prevailing party to submit proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
